measurements.what_it_measures: Maximum sphere–sphere penetration between the arm capsules and the body-core / other arm, computed analytically on the FK'd pose.
measurements.violation_desc: Folding the arms into the torso drives a real overlap; the offending sphere pair reads ≈118 mm while a real teleop pose reads exactly 0 mm.

measurements.what_it_measures: Signed distance from the whole-body CoM ground projection to the nearest edge of the foot support rectangle (>0 = inside / balanced).
measurements.violation_desc: An extreme waist lean shrinks the margin from 118 to 74 mm; on GR-1's light arms it does not cross the edge, and we report that honestly.

measurements.what_it_measures: Per-DoF overshoot beyond the URDF [q_lo, q_hi] limits, summed over the 17 joints on the unsquashed readout.
measurements.violation_desc: An extrapolated (impossible) pose pushes 4 joints past their limits, each excess drawn in red, while the real pose stays fully in-range.

measurements.what_it_measures: Per-frame magnitude of the third time-derivative of the bimanual keypoints — the smoothness of motion over a clip.
measurements.violation_desc: A generated (cache-accelerated) clip is markedly jerkier than the real clip it is paired against, raising mean jerk from 14.6 to 37.5 m/s³.

measurements.what_it_measures: Per-joint aleatoric standard deviation from the β-NLL heteroscedastic readout head — how sure the pose estimate is, per DoF.
measurements.violation_desc: On an ambiguous / occluded frame σ grows on the hard joints (median arm σ 0.065→0.091 rad), flagging a low-confidence reading rather than hard-failing it.
